name: Chicken Deviled Eggs
recipeIngredient: 3/4 tablespoon Hot pepper sauce, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut eggs lengthwise in half. Remove yolks and place in a small bowl.
2. Mash yolks with a fork. Add chicken, mayonnaise, onion, Dijon mustard, hot sauce, and parsley. Mix well. Stuff egg whites with yolk mixture. Sprinkle tops with paprika to garnish. Cover and refrigerate until serving time.
